title: Aurora 12748 9-inch Great Horned Owl, Grey and White
features: Part of Aurora’s highly popular Flopsies Animal Collection
Soft and extremely touchable soft toy made with high quality materials.
Realistic animal with soft and cuddly bean bag bodies.
Children will love this cute and hugely collectible animal.
description: Aurora World’s highly popular Flopsies range brings you an extremely cute and cuddly Great Horned Owl. Made using the finest plush materials, this standing white and greay fluffy Great Horned Owl will make a perfect gift. Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience in designing and manufacturing innovative and high quality plush products.
